menu.name: The 'Fruit of the Spirit' Smoothie
menu.description: A vibrant blend of mango, mixed berries, and banana with a hint of honey. Refreshing and full of life.

menu.name: The 'Daily Bread' Pastry Case
menu.description: Fresh-baked croissants, scones, and muffins made in-house every morning. Ask about today's selection.

menu.name: The 'Selah' Decaf Latte
menu.description: A moment of calm in a cup. Smooth decaf espresso with steamed milk and a touch of vanilla.

menu.name: The 'Never Thirst Again' Latte
menu.description: Our signature latte — rich espresso, velvety steamed milk, and beautiful latte art. Deeply satisfying.

menu.name: The 'Virtuous Pour' Dark Roast
menu.description: A bold, full-bodied dark roast with deep chocolate and smoky notes. Hand-poured to perfection.

menu.name: The 'Strength and Honor' Americano
menu.description: Double-shot espresso over hot water for a clean, powerful cup. Bold and unapologetic.
